title: 有馬記念の後に・終わらない栄華

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's a Mejiro! A Mejiro! Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She flew through the pack like a stream of shining
light accelerating through the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Urgh... I tried to throw her off a bunch of times, but she didn't waver for a second.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What a brave and bold stride... How unflappable
can someone be?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To think that one's pride in their house could
motivate them so much...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You did it, Bright! Congrats! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wow. Just wow, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's right, everyone. Take a good look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This is the light of the new Mejiros!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright has won the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiros' pride, their undying glory—the age
of this esteemed clan is not over yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Prix is won by the successor of a
notable family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The drama of the victory shakes all of Nakayama.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Grandmother! It's Bright, she—

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes, she is a Mejiro. She loves the Mejiros, and
she takes pride in her heritage.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
As long as an Umamusume like her races, the light
of the Mejiro family will never fade.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I believe Bright has now forged a new
path.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer. Did you see? I won.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I once was just a burden but... I think now I've
become the hope of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I thought that it might happen someday, but it
took so much time...
choice_data_list: But you always show up in the end.
But you always show up in the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I hope, one day, people can
understand that about me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I hope they'll come to believe in me, despite my
dawdling nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how slowly she ran, Mejiro Bright
always had her eyes on the summit, even from the
rear of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wasn't the only one who understood that.
choice_data_list:
I always believed in you. So did your
grandmother.

I always believed in you. So did your
grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dearie... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return Mejiro Bright's watery smile with a
confident one of my own, quietly guiding her to
the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winners have a duty to forge the path ahead; to
light the way, so that others may follow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Good day to you all. I am Bright from the Mejiro
family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Today has been an incredible day. I'm so pleased
that I was able to compete against so many
incredible Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I hope you don't mind, but there's something in
particular I would like to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell you how I came to stand in this
circle, this very special place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I walked a path unique to the Mejiros, one paved
by generations of admiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro Umamusume before me have
accomplished incredible feats. However, to me,
those are not mere stories of eminent persons.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They are dazzling stories of freedom, because
each of those Umamusume had their own unique
charm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They held glory in one hand, hardship in the
other. Yet the Mejiro family did not yield. We
persevered in the face of changing times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Though the Mejiro family has changed, we have
always protected what is most important to us,
even today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The reason we have managed to thrive for so long
is because we walk the path that is right for us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Today, I wanted to show that the Mejiros will
continue down that path, but we will also
continue to change.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I hope... I hope my victory today has proven that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's exactly as she says. The Mejiros have
changed, but they have also protected what has
made them so revered.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. The Mejiro family has been around since
long before we were born. One could say their
history is instead legend.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They are a family that reliably proves itself
worthy of admiration. I see no signs that their
light would be extinguished by changing tides.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Words of praise rise to the lips of the nearby
Umamusume while their eyes gleam with
admiration. The light of this well-known family
has not grown dimmer, nor will it anytime soon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've always watched everyone else shine so
brightly from the rear of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's how I know the different ways you all shine.
I can see your light, even now that I stand at the
front.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I invite all Umamusume to join us Mejiros...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...On our path to a bright future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this victory, the Mejiro family avoids being
swept under the wave of a new generation and is
restored to dazzling brilliance alongside Mejiro
Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It might sound like a miracle, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In reality, the stories of many Umamusume,
waiting for their turn in the adoring sunlight, have
long glimmered at the base of Mount Yotei.
